edges.evidence: StudentLife uses smartphone sensing to study behavior and wellbeing in a way that directly follows the mobile sensing paradigm introduced by Reality Mining.
The COVID-19 Reddit/Wikipedia study extends Reality Mining's digital-trace analysis of collective behavior to online information-seeking during a public health crisis.
Self-Instruct leverages instruction-following data generation and alignment ideas that are closely aligned with the open conversational alignment setup presented in OpenAssistant.
WizardLM extends Self-Instruct by evolving seed instructions into more complex ones to improve instruction-following ability.
Principle-Driven Self-Alignment extends Self-Instruct's self-generated supervision idea by using constitutional-style principles to align models with minimal human input.
Zephyr's alignment pipeline relies on direct preference-based distillation ideas that follow the core optimization view introduced by Direct Preference Optimization.
RLAIF vs. RLHF builds on AlpacaFarm's framing of alignment as a comparative learning-from-feedback problem by replacing expensive human labels with AI feedback.
The 2024 human-in-the-loop RL survey explicitly synthesizes modern preference-optimization methods such as DPO as part of the broader RLHF landscape.
The survey incorporates RLAIF vs. RLHF as a representative example of scaling feedback-driven alignment beyond purely human supervision.
The survey builds on AlpacaFarm as prior work that formalizes and evaluates methods for learning from human feedback in language models.
The 2024 Nature paper develops the same recursive-generated-data failure mechanism introduced in the earlier Curse of Recursion preprint.
The 2024 synthetic-content detection review discusses watermarking-based detection strategies that build directly on the watermarking method proposed for large language models.
The review synthesizes detector-evasion and retrieval-based defenses introduced in the paraphrasing-versus-detection study as part of the broader detection landscape.

notes: Added conservative cross-paper links where titles and abstracts indicate clear methodological inheritance or domain extension; no contradicts were added because the provided metadata did not support strong opposing-claims matches with high confidence.
